pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 7 to Java 17 to support the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if source/target levels do not match the target JDK 17 features and class file version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace legacy JUnit 3 dependency with JUnit Jupiter (JUnit 5) engine for modern testing support.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 3 API is obsolete and lacks support for modern test annotations and features required by the new test suite.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.3.0 to ensure compatibility with JUnit 5 and Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may not correctly detect or run JUnit 5 tests or may fail on Java 17 due to module system restrictions.
